enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog from Boulder, recapping that he worked until 4am on a 3D reconstruction project in Google Earth building classical Roman structures (a temple, housing, and Circus Flaminius). He plans to continue at a pace of one major building per day, with goals including the Basilica, Caracalla, and a mission, and muses that a fully rebuilt classical Rome could trigger past-life memories in visitors. He also mentions listening to a podcast about the Tetrarchy to inform a historical timeline project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and committed; believes rebuilding classical Rome would be beautiful and could unlock past-life memories
Prefers walking around at ground level over zooming in from above
